steps.title: Rewrite both equations in standard form
steps.content: Move terms so each equation is in $Ax+By=C$ form. The first becomes $$48x-112y=24.$$ The second becomes $$12x+ry=\frac{1}{8}.$$

steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: No solution means the lines are parallel but distinct. The $x$-coefficient in the second equation is $\frac{1}{4}$ of the first because $12=\frac{1}{4}(48)$. So the $y$-coefficient must also be $\frac{1}{4}$ of the first: $$r=\frac{1}{4}(-112)=-28.$$

steps.title: Confirm the lines are distinct
steps.content: The constants are not in the same ratio: $\frac{1}{8}$ is not $\frac{1}{4}$ of $24$. So the lines are parallel and distinct, giving no solution. The answer is -28.
